theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_58536
theorems.statement:
∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ)
  (h₀ : ∀ x, 0 ≤ x ∧ Int.ceil x % 2 = 1 → f x = x - 1)
  (h₁ : ∀ x, 0 ≤ x ∧ (Int.ceil x % 2 = 0 ∨ x = 0) → f x = -1 - x)
  (h₂ : ∀ x, x ≤ 0 ∧ Int.floor (-x) % 2 = 1 → f x = 1 + x)
  (h₃ : ∀ x, x ≤ 0 ∧ (Int.floor (-x) % 2 = 0 ∨ x = 0) → f x = 1 - x)
  (h₄ : ∀ x, f (f x) = -x), ∀ x, 0 ≤ x ∧ Int.ceil x % 2 = 1 → f x = x - 1 ∧
  ∀ x, 0 ≤ x ∧ (Int.ceil x % 2 = 0 ∨ x = 0) → f x = -1 - x ∧
  ∀ x, x ≤ 0 ∧ Int.floor (-x) % 2 = 1 → f x = 1 + x ∧
  ∀ x, x ≤ 0 ∧ (Int.floor (-x) % 2 = 0 ∨ x = 0) → f x = 1 - x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_43517
theorems.statement:
∀ (x : ℝ)
  (σ : Equiv ℝ ℝ)
  (h₀ : ∀ x, σ.1 x = 3 * x)
  (h₁ : σ.2 x = 1 / 3 * x), σ.1 x + σ.2 x = 10 / 3 * x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_65847
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf1 : ∀ x, f x + f (1 - x) = Real.sin x ^ 2) (hf2 : ∀ x, f x - f (1 - x) = Real.sin (1 - x) ^ 2), ∀ x, f x = 2 / 3 * Real.sin x ^ 2 - 1 / 3 * Real.sin (1 - x) ^ 2

theorems.name: lean_workbook_45573
theorems.statement:
∀ (f : ℕ → ℕ → ℕ) (x : ℕ) (n : ℕ)
  (h₀ : ∀ x, f x 0 = x)
  (h₁ : ∀ x n, f x (n + 1) = f (f x n) n), f x n = x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_45892
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : a ∈ Set.Icc (-2) 2) (hb : b ∈ Set.Icc (-2) 2) (hc : c ∈ Set.Icc (-2) 2) (hab : a + b + c = 0), a^3 + b^3 + c^3 ≤ 6

theorems.name: lean_workbook_46878
theorems.statement: ∀ (k a b c: ℝ) (h₁ : a ≥ 0 ∧ b ≥ 0 ∧ c ≥ 0 ∧ a + b + c = 2) (h₂ : a ^ k + b ^ k + c ^ k = 2) (h₃ : k ≥ 1), a + b + c ≤ a * b * c + 2

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_21944
theorems.statement: ∀ a : ℝ, ∃ l : ℝ, ∑' n : ℕ, (a ^ n / n.factorial) = l

theorems.name: lean_workbook_47613
theorems.statement: ∀ (n a b : ℤ) (h1 : n ∣ a) (h2 : n ∣ b), n ∣ a + b

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_69089
theorems.statement: ∀ (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x ∧ x < 3), 1 + 2 * Real.sqrt x ≥ x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_28338
theorems.statement: ∀ (a p : ℕ) (hp : p.Prime) (h : a.Coprime p), a^(Nat.totient p) ≡ 1 [ZMOD p]

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_54504
theorems.statement: ∀ k : ℕ, (k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 1 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 1 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 4 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 4 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 5 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k ≡ 6 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k ≡ 7 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 1 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 7 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 8 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 8 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 9 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 1 [ZMOD 4] ∨ k ≡ 9 [ZMOD 10] ∧ k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 4]) → (k^k ≡ 0 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 1 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 2 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 3 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 4 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 5 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 6 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 7 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 8 [ZMOD 10] ∨ k^k ≡ 9 [ZMOD 10])

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_40144
theorems.statement: ∀ (x y : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x ∧ x < 1) (hy : 0 < y ∧ y < 1), (x / (1 - x) + y / (1 - y)) ≥ 2 * (Real.sqrt (x * y) / (1 - Real.sqrt (x * y)))

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_3432
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℕ → ℕ) (P : ℕ → ℕ → Prop) (hP : ∀ x y, P (f x) y → f (x * y) = f x * f y), ∀ x y, P (f x) y → f x * f y = f x * f y

theorems.name: lean_workbook_20014
theorems.statement: ∀ (x y z : ℝ) (hx : x > 0) (hy : y > 0) (hz : z > 0) (habc : x * y * z = 1), x ^ 2 + y ^ 2 + z ^ 2 ≥ x * y + y * z + z * x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_45444
theorems.statement: ∀ (x y z : ℝ) (h : x + y + z ≥ x * y * z), x^2 + y^2 + z^2 ≥ x * y * z

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_49744
theorems.statement:
∀ (A B : Set α)
  (h₀ : A = {x | x ∈ B}), A \ B = {x | x ∈ A ∧ x ∉ B}

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_73605
theorems.statement: ∀ (n k : ℕ) (h : k ≤ n), ∑ i ∈ Finset.Icc k n, Nat.choose i k = Nat.choose (n + 1) (k + 1)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_18571
theorems.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), Nat.choose n k = 2 ^ n

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_77947
theorems.statement: ∀ (x y : ℝ) (h : x < y), ∃ r s : ℚ, x < ↑r ∧ ↑r < s ∧ s < y

theorems.name: lean_workbook_42026
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : a ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hb : b ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 0 1), (a / (2 * a + 1) + b / (2 * b + 1) + c / (2 * c + 1)) ≤ 1

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_250
theorems.statement: ∀ (k : ℝ) (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf: f = fun x ↦ k * x), f x = k * x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_20741
theorems.statement: ∀ (n k : ℕ) (h₁ : n ≥ k) (h₂ : k ≥ 0), Nat.choose n k = Nat.choose n (n-k)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_57913
theorems.statement:
∀ (M : Finset ℕ) (Mpos : ∀ m ∈ M, 0 < m)
    (Mdivisors : ∀ m ∈ M, ∀ n, m.Prime ∧ n ∣ m → m ≤ 23), ∃ M' : Finset ℕ, M' ⊆ M ∧ ∃ k, M'.prod id = k^4

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_75048
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ) (hf: f = fun (x:ℝ) => 2 * x) (hx: 0 < x), f x = 2 * x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_63979
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ), (∀ x y : ℝ, f (x + y) = x + f y) ↔ ∃ a :ℝ, ∀ x : ℝ, f x = x + a

theorems.name: lean_workbook_37243
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c) (habc : a + b + c = 3), Real.sqrt a + Real.sqrt b + Real.sqrt c ≥ a * b + b * c + c * a

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_37629
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b : ℝ) (hab : a * b > 0), a + b ≠ 0

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_70407
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : 0 < a) (hb : 0 < b) (hc : 0 < c) (hab : a + b + c = a * b + b * c + c * a), a * b ^ 2 + b * c ^ 2 + c * a ^ 2 ≥ a + b + c ∧ a + b + c ≥ 3

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_63241
theorems.statement: ∀ (ε : ℝ) (hε : 0 < ε) (hε' : ε < 1), ∃ n : ℤ, (Real.cos n ≥ 1 - ε)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_2627
theorems.statement: ∀ (n r : ℕ) (h : n ≥ r), (∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc r n, Nat.choose k r) = Nat.choose (n + 1) (r + 1)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_15974
theorems.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ), ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (k - 1) = ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n - 1), k

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_6818
theorems.statement: ∀ (x y z : ℝ) (hx : x ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hy : y ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hz : z ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hab : x * y * z = (1 - x) * (1 - y) * (1 - z)), x * (1 - z) + y * (1 - x) + z * (1 - y) ≥ 3 / 4

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_82811
theorems.statement: ∀ (x : ℝ) (P : ℝ → ℝ) (h₁ : P x = -x), P x = -x

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_17714
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : a ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hb : b ∈ Set.Icc 0 1) (hc : c ∈ Set.Icc 0 1), a^3 + b^3 + c^3 + 6 * a * b * c ≤ a^2 + b^2 + c^2 + (a + b + c - 1) * (a * b + b * c + a * c)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_56898
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (h : a ≥ b ∧ b ≥ c), a - c ≥ b - c ∧ b - c ≥ 0

theorems.name: lean_workbook_18285
theorems.statement: ∀ (n a b : ℝ) (hn : n > 0), n^a * n^b = n^(a + b)

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_5838
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b m : ℤ) (n : ℕ) (h₁ : a ≡ b [ZMOD m]), a ^ n ≡ b ^ n [ZMOD m]

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_56477
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c m n p : ℤ), m = a + 2 * b + c ∧ n = a + b + 2 * c ∧ p = a + b + 3 * c ↔ a = 5 * n - 3 * p - m ∧ b = m + p - 2 * n ∧ c = p - n

theorems.name: lean_workbook_36537
theorems.statement: ∀ (β θ : ℝ), (Real.sin β + Real.cos θ + 1)^2 ≥ 2 * (Real.sin β + 1) * (Real.cos θ + 1) → Real.sin β ^ 2 ≥ Real.sin θ ^ 2

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_8957
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c k : ℝ) (h₁ : k = a + b + c) (h₂ : a + b + c ≠ 0), a / k + b / k + c / k = 1

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_2104
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c d : ℝ) (h1 : a ≥ b ∧ b ≥ c ∧ c ≥ d ∧ d ≥ 0) (h2 : a + b + c + d = 2), a * b * (b + c) + b * c * (c + d) + c * d * (d + a) + d * a * (a + b) ≤ 1

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_66893
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (h1 : a ≤ b) (h2 : b ≤ c), a + b ≤ c + a ∧ c + a ≤ b + c

theorems.name: lean_workbook_23959
theorems.statement: ∀ (θ : ℝ), (1 - Real.sin θ) * (Real.sin θ ^ 2 + Real.sin θ + 1) = 1 - Real.sin θ ^ 3

theorems.name: lean_workbook_57075
theorems.statement: ∀ p : ℕ, p.Prime → (2 * p.choose p ≡ 2 [ZMOD p ^ 3])

theorems.name: lean_workbook_19628
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℝ → ℝ) (A : Set ℝ) (hA : A = {0}), ∃ f : ℝ → ℝ, ∀ x, f x = 0

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_35648
theorems.statement: ∀ (f : ℕ → ℕ) (k : ℕ) (h : ∀ x, f x = k), ∀ x, f x = k

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_59109
theorems.statement: ∀ (a b c : ℝ) (ha : a > 0) (hb : b > 0) (hc : c > 0) (habc : a * b * c = 1) (h : a^2 + b^2 + c^2 = 1), 3 ≤ ab / c + bc / a + ca / b

theorems.name: lean_workbook_plus_35379
theorems.statement: ∀ x y z : ℝ, x ∈ Set.Ioo 0 1 ∧ y ∈ Set.Ioo 0 1 ∧ z ∈ Set.Ioo 0 1 → x * (1 - y) + y * (1 - z) + z * (1 - x) < 1

theorems.name: lean_workbook_16493
theorems.statement: ∀ (n : ℕ) (A : Matrix (Fin (2 * n - 1)) (Fin n) ℤ) (hA : 0 < n), (∑ i ∈ Finset.univ, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ, A i j ≥ n → (∃ B : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) ℤ, ∑ i ∈ Finset.univ, ∑ j ∈ Finset.univ, B i j ≥ n))
